{{Quote|Lucky we were drinking Reactor Cores. Why do you think smugglers order them so much? They taste awful, but they grant immunity to all sorts--|Jet Nebula|<ref name="FA">''[[The Old Republic: Fatal Alliance]]''</ref>}}
A '''Reactor Core''' was a popular [[cocktail|mixed drink]] among [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]]. It was said to give partial immunity to certain toxins and dangerous gases.<ref name="FA" /> It also produced hallucinations due to the narcotic agents released by combining [[Spice Liqueur]] and [[Blue Tonic]]. It was similar to [[Meltdown (cocktail)|the Meltdown]].<ref name="GG9" />
